description: Gemini Live Conversation Pipeline — Replace the serial text+TTS pipeline with Gemini Live API bidirectional audio streaming for <1s time-to-first-audio, consistent NPC voice, and natural conversational flow with parallel language analysis side-channel

userStories.title: Create Gemini Live Session Manager
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a server-side manager that creates and maintains persistent Gemini Live sessions so that NPC conversations use bidirectional audio streaming.
acceptanceCriteria: Create server/services/conversation/live/live-session-manager.ts with a LiveSessionManager class
createSession(config) method calls ai.live.connect() with responseModalities: ['AUDIO', 'TEXT'], system prompt, voice config, and language code. Returns a LiveConversationSession wrapper
getSession(sessionId) method retrieves an active session by ID
endSession(sessionId) method calls session.close() and cleans up
Sessions auto-expire after 5 minutes of inactivity (configurable)
Maximum 10 concurrent Live sessions per server (configurable)
System prompt sent via session.sendClientContent() at session creation
Voice configuration set via speechConfig.voiceConfig using NPC voice profile and speechConfig.languageCode from world target language
Add test: create a session, verify it connects and receives the onopen callback
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Two Live API models available: gemini-2.5-flash-native-audio-latest and gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview (already configured in GEMINI_MODELS.LIVE). Test both for voice quality and latency. LiveConnectConfig supports responseModalities, speechConfig, systemInstruction, and realtimeInputConfig. Each session is a persistent WebSocket — limit concurrent sessions. All prerequisite plumbing (systemPrompt, characterGender, prologFacts, cefrLevel threading) is already merged in both SSE and WS paths.

userStories.title: Implement LiveConversationSession wrapper
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a wrapper around the raw Gemini Live session that handles audio/text routing, turn management, and event dispatching.
acceptanceCriteria: Create LiveConversationSession class with constructor accepting raw Session and callbacks object
sendAudio(data, mimeType) method calls session.sendRealtimeInput({ audio: { data: base64, mimeType } })
sendText(text) method calls session.sendClientContent() with user turn
onmessage handler dispatches: audio parts -> onAudioChunk, text parts -> onTextChunk, turnComplete -> onTurnComplete, interrupted -> onInterrupted, transcription -> onTranscription
Track accumulated text across parts for onTurnComplete full text
Handle generationComplete signal
Add test: mock a Live session, send text, verify callbacks fire correctly
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: onmessage receives LiveServerMessage with serverContent.modelTurn.parts[] containing interleaved text and audio Part objects. Audio parts have inlineData.data (base64), text parts have text field.

userStories.title: Wire Live sessions into WebSocket bridge
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the WS bridge to use Live sessions for conversations when available, falling back to the existing text+TTS pipeline when not.
acceptanceCriteria: In ws-bridge.ts handleTextInput(), check for Live session and route through it if available
If Live session exists: send text via liveSession.sendText(), responses flow through callbacks -> WS events
If no Live session: fall back to existing llmProvider.streamCompletion() + TTS pipeline
New WS message type startLiveSession creates session via LiveSessionManager with NPC prompt, voice, language
New WS message type audioInput relays mic audio to liveSession.sendAudio()
Map Live callbacks to WS events: onAudioChunk -> binary+audio_meta, onTextChunk -> text JSON, onTurnComplete -> done, onInterrupted -> interrupted, onTranscription -> transcript
On endSession, tear down the Live session
Add test: send startLiveSession then textInput, verify audio+text events come back
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: The existing handleTextInput() flow should remain as fallback. Live session is an alternative path selected when client requests it. Text input should work alongside voice input in the same session.

userStories.title: Add client-side Live session support to InsimulClient
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the InsimulClient to support Live sessions so that BabylonChatPanel can stream mic audio and receive streaming audio+text responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Add startLiveSession() method to ServerChatProvider that sends startLiveSession WS message with characterId, worldId, systemPrompt, voiceName, languageCode
Add sendAudioChunk(data: Uint8Array) method that sends raw audio via WS binary frame
Update sendText() to detect Live session and route through textInput (which goes through Live session on server)
Handle new WS event types: transcript, interrupted
Wire onAudioChunk to existing StreamingAudioPlayer
Expose startLiveSession() and sendAudioChunk() on InsimulClient public API
Add test: call startLiveSession(), verify WS message sent with correct parameters
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Client already has StreamingAudioPlayer for PCM playback and HandsFreeController for mic capture. Live session connects these directly through the server. ServerTTSProvider (no-op marker) remains correct.

userStories.title: Integrate Live session into BabylonChatPanel
userStories.description: As a player, I need the chat panel to use Live sessions for voice conversation so that NPC responses are immediate and natural-sounding.
acceptanceCriteria: In initConversationClient(), after InsimulClient ready, call startLiveSession() with NPC system prompt, voice profile, target language
In hands-free mode, stream mic audio chunks directly to sendAudioChunk() instead of waiting for browser STT transcript
For typed text, send via sendText() which routes through Live session
Display text chunks in chat UI as they arrive
Play audio chunks via StreamingAudioPlayer as they arrive
On interrupted event, stop audio playback and show visual indicator
On transcript event, display player's transcribed speech in chat
On hide(), signal server to end Live session
Fall back to text+TTS pipeline if Live session creation fails
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: HandsFreeController currently captures audio and runs browser STT. With Live sessions, it should stream raw PCM directly — the Live session handles STT natively. Typed text input should still work in the same session.

userStories.title: Implement parallel side-channel for language analysis
userStories.description: As a developer, I need language learning analysis to run in parallel with the Live audio pipeline so that side-effects don't block audio delivery.
acceptanceCriteria: In LiveConversationSession onTurnComplete callback, fork accumulated text to non-blocking side-channel
Side-channel runs three tasks concurrently (fire-and-forget): metadata extraction (Gemini Flash), quest goal evaluation (Gemini Flash), language progress tracking (local, no LLM)
Side-channel results sent to client as WS events: vocab_hints, grammar_feedback, eval, quest_progress
If any side-channel task fails, log error but don't affect conversation
Add test: mock turn complete, verify all three side-channel tasks triggered
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Current pipeline runs metadata extraction AFTER full response, blocking the SSE stream. Side-channel decouples them. Uses GEMINI_MODELS.FLASH for analysis, separate from Live session model.

userStories.title: Add Live session support to SSE fallback path
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the SSE endpoint to also support Live sessions for clients that can't use WebSockets.
acceptanceCriteria: In http-bridge.ts, add option to use Live session when useLiveSession: true in request body
Create Live session with client's system prompt, voice, and language
Send player's text via liveSession.sendText()
Stream audio chunks as base64 SSE events (same format as current)
Stream text chunks as text SSE events (same format as current)
Close Live session after turnComplete
Fall back to text+TTS pipeline if Live session fails
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Lower priority than WS path. SSE creates a new Live session per request (not persistent) since SSE doesn't support continuous bidirectional communication. Still faster than text+TTS because it eliminates sentence splitting.

userStories.title: Automated tests for Live conversation pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests covering the Live session lifecycle to prevent regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: create Live session -> send text -> receive audio+text -> end session
Test: create Live session -> send audio -> receive audio+text with input transcription
Test: Live session unavailable -> falls back to text+TTS pipeline
Test: side-channel fires metadata extraction and quest evaluation in parallel
Test: session auto-expires after inactivity timeout
Test: concurrent session limit enforced
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Mock the Gemini Live API for tests to avoid real API calls. Test the session manager, wrapper, WS bridge integration, and fallback behavior.
